nasb.text: ‘Then on the fourth day: ten bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs one year old without defect;

esv.text: “On the fourth day ten bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,

cnv.text: “‘第四日，要獻公牛十頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

ccb.text: “节期的第四天，你们要献上毫无残疾的公牛十头、公绵羊两只和一岁的公羊羔十四只；
